```{r neighborhood-slide-setup}
#| include: false
# This child document is called by chicago_neighborhoods.qmd via knit_child().
# It expects `current_slug` to be set in the parent's loop environment.

library(here)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(wordcloud2)
library(leaflet)
library(htmlwidgets)
library(stringr)
library(scales)

source(here("R", "utils", "chart_functions.R"))

# Load data passed from parent (neighborhood_metrics already loaded there)
row <- neighborhood_metrics |> filter(slug == current_slug)
biz_cats_row <- biz_by_category |> filter(slug == current_slug)

# Convenience variables
nbhd_name    <- row$name
total_biz    <- row$total_active_businesses
diversity    <- round(row$business_diversity_index, 2)
sent_label   <- row$sentiment_label
sent_class   <- tolower(sent_label)
post_count   <- row$post_count
engagement   <- row$total_engagement
ai_text      <- coalesce(row$ai_summary, "_No AI summary available._")
top_words    <- row$top_words
dq_flag      <- row$data_quality_flag
area_num     <- row$community_area_number
geojson_path <- here("data", "reference", "chicago_community_areas.geojson")
```

## `r nbhd_name` {.neighborhood-slide}

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="55%"}

<div class="ai-summary">
`r ai_text`
</div>

::: {.stat-grid}
::: {.stat-box}
<div class="stat-value">`r scales::comma(total_biz)`</div>
<div class="stat-label">Active Businesses</div>
:::
::: {.stat-box}
<div class="stat-value">`r diversity`</div>
<div class="stat-label">Diversity Index</div>
:::
::: {.stat-box}
<div class="stat-value">`r scales::comma(post_count)`</div>
<div class="stat-label">Reddit Posts</div>
:::
:::

Sentiment: <span class="sentiment-badge `r sent_class`">`r sent_label`</span>

```{r business-chart}
#| fig-height: 3.5
#| fig-width: 6
if (nrow(biz_cats_row) > 0) {
  make_business_bar_chart(biz_cats_row, nbhd_name)
} else {
  ggplot() +
    annotate("text", x = 0.5, y = 0.5, label = "No business data available",
             size = 5, color = "#757575") +
    theme_void()
}
```

:::

::: {.column width="45%"}

```{r minimap}
#| out-width: "100%"
if (file.exists(geojson_path)) {
  make_leaflet_minimap(geojson_path, area_num, nbhd_name)
}
```

```{r wordcloud}
#| out-width: "100%"
if (dq_flag != "business_only" && !is.na(top_words) && nchar(top_words) > 0) {
  words_vec <- str_split(top_words, ",\\s*")[[1]]
  # Assign synthetic frequency (decreasing for top-20 ordering)
  wc_df <- data.frame(
    word = words_vec,
    freq = seq(100, by = -4, length.out = length(words_vec))
  )
  wordcloud2(
    wc_df,
    size        = 0.5,
    color       = "random-dark",
    backgroundColor = "white",
    minRotation = -pi/6,
    maxRotation =  pi/6,
    rotateRatio = 0.3
  )
} else if (dq_flag == "business_only") {
  cat('<p class="data-quality-notice">No Reddit data available for this neighborhood.</p>')
}
```

`r if (dq_flag == "low_reddit") '<p class="data-quality-notice">⚠ Limited Reddit data (&lt;10 posts) — sentiment estimate may be unreliable.</p>'`

:::

:::
